title: elaphoglossum lankesteri
intro: Elaphoglossum lankesteri, also known as the Lankster's Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to the tropical regions of Central America and southern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to contribute to its potential health benefits in reducing fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and treat respiratory issues. Elaphoglossum lankesteri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
